subcodes.first_line: O Afnán, My glory and My favor rest upon thee! Your letter arrived and was read before the sovereign throne of the Speaker on Sinai
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی و عنایتی نامه ات رسید و در پیشگاه حضور مکلم طور بشرف اصغا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prophecy and fulfillment, @firmness in the Covenant
